candidates.why: Primary revenue line; clearly represents total revenue/sales and matches REVT definition better than cost or finance-related candidates.
Component of revenue but more specific; less appropriate than the aggregate 'Revenue' line for total REVT.
Direct cost line tied to revenues; represents COGS for periods where it is populated.
Direct cost line used in other periods; together with 'Cost of Revenues' covers COGS across years.
Total cost of revenues/cost of sales, but guidance prefers component lines over totals when components exist.

variables.notes: Using both component labels because they appear to be the same direct cost concept reported under different names in different years.

candidates.why: Typical SG&A-type overhead expense; appears twice for different functional groupings and should be included as an SG&A component.
Classic SG&A category (general and administrative); should be included as SG&A component.
Same concept as 'Other operating expenses' (different capitalization); SG&A-type overhead.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Included 'Sales and marketing expenses' in addition to the candidate rows because it is a core SG&A category clearly representing selling expenses. Both variants of 'Other operating expenses/Other Operating Expense' are included as overhead components. No totals or depreciation/impairment/finance lines were selected. Manual review recommended to confirm whether any part of 'Operational / supply chain expenses' should be treated as SG&A or COGS; it appears more like COGS and was excluded from SG&A. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Sales and marketing expenses

candidates.row_label: Research and development expenses net of governmental grants
candidates.why: Primary R&D expense line already net of government grants; best aggregate for total R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Research & Development
candidates.why: Component of R&D; more granular but subtotal line already exists.
Represents capitalized portion of R&D; usually excluded from period expense but part of R&D disclosure.
Reduction to R&D due to grants; included in net figure above.
Residual R&D expense; component of the total R&D line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization related to R&D assets; part of R&D but the main operating R&D expense is captured in the net R&D line.

final_choice.row_label: Research and development expenses net of governmental grants

variables.notes: Chose the aggregate net R&D expense line rather than its components to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Explicit interest expense line; primary choice for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; include as a backup label in case main interest line is missing in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of the same lease interest; used only if primary lines are missing.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Provided multiple labels as a priority list so later processing can use the first non-missing interest expense each year.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent
candidates.why: Owner/parent equity excluding non-controlling interests; exactly matches BE definition.
Equals parent equity in this case, but includes NCI when present; secondary option only.
Component of equity but appears empty; less appropriate than the aggregate parent-equity line.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent

variables.notes: Parent-only equity line chosen to avoid double-counting non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: Balance sheet NCI line; primary source for minority interest in equity.
Alternative NCI label; may be populated in some periods, so included as backup.
Income statement minority share of profit/loss; not an equity stock but indicates presence of NCI.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Minority interest in comprehensive income, not equity stock; ancillary.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet minority interest lines as a priority list; income-statement minority interest rows are flows and therefore excluded for MIB.
